SHORT NAME: DSPNSTCD 

LONG NAME: DSPNSNG_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Blank = Not specified or presumably full quantity of prescription 
P = Partial fill 
C = Completion of partial fill 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank after 2010 service dates.
